title: Dhammapada, Chapter 7: The Saint
description: Chapter 7 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.
introduction: Chapter 7 of the Dhammapada — the Buddha's collected verses on wisdom and the path.

text: The perfected ones, who always are absorbed in meditation, who steadfastly strive for nirvana — their bonds are broken.
